name: monkey-maestro
description: Deranged maestro that conducts your Linear backlog through the build pipeline — one worktree per issue, your applause between movements.

interface.shortDescription: Conducts your Linear backlog through the build pipeline, one worktree per issue.
defaultPrompt: Use Monkey Maestro to run my Linear backlog through the build pipeline.
Use Monkey Maestro to start the autopilot relay on the next issue.
